data.title: IRS Data Shows Average Tax Refunds Jump 10.9% In 2026 Filing Season
data.description: In the latest report by the Internal Revenue Service (IRS), it has been revealed that average tax refunds in the United States have seen an increase during the 2026 filing season. As of March 20, the average refund amount has risen to $3,571, showing a substantial growth of $350 or 10.9% from the previous year's $3,221 at the same point. The total refund payments have also experienced a surge, with the IRS issuing over $202 billion thus far, up from $179 billion in the previous year. The total number of refunds has slightly increased to approximately 56.7 million, marking a 1.8% rise. Despite the higher refund amounts, there has been a slight decline in overall filing activity, with total returns received dropping by 0.9% to 78.9 million, and returns processed falling by 1.1% to 77.8 million. A notable trend observed is the increase in self-prepared returns, which have gone up by 1.9% to surpass 37.8 million. Conversely, filings managed by tax professionals have decreased by 1% to 39.7 million.

data.title: MINISO Group Announces December Quarter and Full Year of 2025 Unaudited Financial Results
data.description: The company achieved an all-time high in revenue due to significant brand momentum and successful upgrades to their store matrix. Both quarterly and annual revenue reached record levels, surpassing projections. The adjusted operating profit and EBITDA experienced strong double-digit growth in the December quarter. The MINISO brand saw its highest performance yet.

data.title: Senators probe SEC on enforcement chief departure, Justin Sun issue after clashes. Report says ex-chief quit amid disputes over cases linked to Trump.
data.description: Earlier this month, a report stated that the former chief of enforcement at the SEC had disagreements with the agency's leadership over cases related to individuals connected to former President Trump. The official resigned following these clashes. The report did not mention specific names or specific cases, but it highlighted tensions within the agency. The SEC's former enforcement chief was involved in investigating a significant number of cases involving individuals linked to the previous administration, indicating a notable point of contention.

data.title: Senators pitch 'Mined in America Act' to increase BTC mining manufacturing in US. US has 38% of Bitcoin hashrate but 97% of mining machines are from Chinese firms.
data.description: A Bitcoin policy advocate revealed that despite the US accounting for 38% of Bitcoin's hashrate, the mining industry is dominated by two Chinese companies which manufacture 97% of the mining machines.

data.title: Worldcoin's current price at $0.28 may see a recovery to $0.34 despite bearish momentum, supported by oversold RSI.
data.description: At a trading price of $0.28, the stock WLD is currently experiencing oversold conditions according to the Relative Strength Index (RSI), indicating a possible increase to the $0.34 resistance level in the upcoming weeks. However, bearish momentum remains prevalent as it trades below important moving averages.

data.title: Philip Morris International Presents its Value Report 2025: change in motion
data.description: In Stamford, CT, Philip Morris International (NYSE: PM) has unveiled its Value Report 2025, providing an in-depth analysis of the company's strategies for sustainable value generation. This report signifies the fulfillment of PMI's 2025 Roadmap, highlighting accomplishments in alignment with the objectives set in 2020. Additionally, the report introduces the Value Plan 2030+, outlining future initiatives for sustainable development. Over the past decade, PMI has been dedicated to advancing its industry position, striving for long-term growth and success.

data.title: SHIB price eyes critical support test to shape March path. RSI at 50.60; MACD shows bearish trend. Support/resistance levels crucial.
data.description: The Shiba Inu cryptocurrency is currently trading with a Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 50.60, signaling a neutral position. There is a bearish momentum indicated by the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD). Analysts are looking at key support and resistance levels to forecast the short-term movement of SHIB.
